skill_slug.description: Kebab-case slug for the skill package directory. Must match pattern `^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$`.

domain.description: Skill domain bucket. Must be one of: `devops`. Determines where under `skills/<domain>/` the builder scaffolds files.

skill_category.description: Top-level skill category used in frontmatter `category:`. One of: `devops`.

feature_summary.description: Plain-English one-paragraph description of what the artifact does. Must be at least 1 characters so the builder has enough signal to decompose the feature; shorter values trigger `REFUSAL_INPUT_AMBIGUOUS`.

api_version.description: Salesforce API version written into generated `*-meta.xml` files. Must match pattern `^\d{2}\.0$` (e.g., `60.0`).

target_org_alias.description: sf CLI alias of the org used for Gate B live-org grounding (`describe_org`, `describe_sobject`, SOQL probes). Optional — when omitted, the builder runs in library-only mode and confidence is capped at MEDIUM.

repo_path.description: Repo-relative root of the caller's `force-app` source tree; the builder writes emitted artifacts underneath this path. Defaults to `./`.
